list.name: LOT 이벤트
list.rawQuery: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime(substr(Time,1,19), '-9 hours')) AS time, substr(Description,1,60) AS text, 'LOT' AS tags FROM histories WHERE LogType = 4 AND Time >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') ORDER BY Time ASC

list.name: Recipe 변경
list.rawQuery: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime(substr(Time,1,19), '-9 hours')) AS time, substr(Description,1,60) AS text, 'Recipe' AS tags FROM histories WHERE LogType = 5 AND Time >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') ORDER BY Time ASC

list.name: 시스템 이벤트
list.rawQuery: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime(substr(Time,1,19), '-9 hours')) AS time, trim(substr(Description,1,60)) AS text, 'System' AS tags FROM histories WHERE LogType = 1 AND Time >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') ORDER BY Time ASC

list.name: Teaching 변경
list.rawQuery: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime(substr(Time,1,19), '-9 hours')) AS time, CASE WHEN instr(Description,char(10))>0 THEN trim(substr(Description,1,instr(Description,char(10))-1)) ELSE trim(substr(Description,1,60)) END AS text, 'Teaching' AS tags FROM histories WHERE LogType = 5 AND Description LIKE '%Teaching%' AND Time >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') ORDER BY Time ASC

panels.title: 수율 + 이벤트 Annotation (알람 발생 맥락)
panels.description: 이벤트 발생 시점을 수율 그래프 위에 마킹. 어떤 이벤트 이후 수율이 떨어졌는지 확인.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Item = 'PASS' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS yield FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime(substr(Time,1,19), '-9 hours')) AS 시각, CASE LogType WHEN 1 THEN '시스템' WHEN 5 THEN CASE WHEN Description LIKE '%Teaching%' THEN 'Teaching' ELSE 'Recipe' END WHEN 4 THEN CASE WHEN Description NOT LIKE '%INSPECTION RESULT%' THEN 'LOT' ELSE 'Inspection' END ELSE CAST(LogType AS TEXT) END AS 구분, CASE WHEN instr(Description, char(10)) > 0 THEN trim(substr(Description,1,instr(Description,char(10))-1)) ELSE trim(substr(Description,1,100)) END AS 내용 FROM histories WHERE Time >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') ORDER BY Time DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT CASE LogType WHEN 1 THEN 'System' WHEN 2 THEN 'Inspection' WHEN 4 THEN 'LOT' WHEN 5 THEN 'Recipe' ELSE CAST(LogType AS TEXT) END AS 구분, COUNT(*) AS count FROM histories WHERE Time >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY LogType ORDER BY count DESC
